content.en:
It took Ye Tian a little time to successfully copy a third-stage immeasurable ruin monster, and then re-copied a real copy body, which lifted the heavily damaged copy body.

Immediately, Ye Tian let the real body copy body hide in the body of the Infinite Ruin Monster in order to deal with special situations.

After all, the combat effectiveness of the Infinite Ruins Monster's copy body is too low, and it may encounter danger at any time, so it still needs to copy the body of the body for combat protection.

......

Immeasurable sea of suffering.

After the Blood Ancestor recovered the burning immeasurable blood here, he prepared to leave here.

Just as he was about to leave the Sea of Immeasurable Suffering, a figure walked in from outside the Infinite Suffering and came directly in front of the Blood Ancestor.

"Endless Ancestor!"

The Bloody Great Ancestor was taken aback, thinking that Ye Tian had rushed out of the Infinite Realm Ruins, but after a closer look, he found that something was wrong.

This is definitely not the Endless Ancestor who entered the Infinite Realm Ruins, it should be said that it is not the clone.

He knew very well what kind of situation it was, even if the Endless Ancestor escaped, it would inevitably consume a lot, even a heavy injury, but the Endless Ancestor in front of him did not have any injuries.

Therefore, this is either the essence of the Endless Great Ancestor or another clone.

"Blood Ancestor, the immeasurable blood gold stone has not been lost, right?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"Naturally, I didn't lose it!" said the Bloody Great Ancestor.

Immediately, he asked again, "Endless Great Ancestor, how is your clone, why don't you take it?"

"It's fallen!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

When the Raccoon Blood Ancestor heard this, he said regretfully: "It's a pity, this time you lost such an important clone of the Endless Ancestor, I will share some immeasurable blood gold stones!"

"According to the previously agreed distribution!"

Ye Tian would not take advantage of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, this opportunity was also brought by the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, if the Bloody Ancestor did not bring him, he could wait until he broke through to the fourth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, and then try to go to the Infinite Realm Ruins.

However, the Blood Ancestor probably also knew that it was too difficult to become a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, so he wanted to obtain the Immeasurable Blood Golden Stone first.

Because the Immeasurable Blood Stone is not only useful for the high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the fourth stage, but also can be used to break through the resources of the fourth stage, but the effect is not very good, and it takes a lot of immeasurable blood stones to break through.

In that case, the immeasurable blood gold stone would be wasted.

The most suitable resource to help the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms break through is the Void Golden Water, which is the most suitable resource for the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms to break through.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to distribute with the Blood Ancestor.

At this time, Ye Tian proposed: "Raccoon Blood Ancestor, give me all the immeasurable blood stones you have collected, and I will give you a part of the immeasurable blood gold stones!"

"Endless Great Ancestor, do you want immeasurable bloodstones?"

The Blood Ancestor was shocked.

Because he felt that with Ye Tian's strength cultivation, he shouldn't need immeasurable blood stones!

Thinking that Ye Tian seemed to be collecting Void Silver Water before, it was obvious that Ye Tian had secrets that he didn't know, and he didn't want to explore more.

Anyway, this matter was in his favor, so he naturally agreed.

Soon, they had distributed both the Infinite Blood Gold Stone and the Infinite Blood Stone.

"Endless Great Ancestor, there is a chance to cooperate again!"

As he spoke, the Blood Ancestor hurriedly retreated and left at an extremely fast speed.

Ye Tian looked at this scene and smiled slightly, he knew the reason why the Raccoon Blood Ancestor walked so fast, probably because he was afraid that he would do it.

After all, his strength far surpassed that of the Raccoon Blood Ancestor, and if he made a move, the Raccoon Blood Ancestor would not be able to resist it at all.

Still, he wouldn't do such a thing.

......

Ruins of stone towers.

Ye Tian's replica body came back with a lot of immeasurable blood stones and immeasurable blood stones.

For him, the biggest gain this time was not the immeasurable blood stones, but these immeasurable blood stones.

The Infinite Blood Stone is far less valuable than the Infinite Blood Stone, but he has the ability to fuse all things, so he can fuse these Infinite Blood Stones into the Infinite Blood Stone.

When the time comes, he will have a huge amount of immeasurable blood gold stones!

"It would be nice if you could trade the Infinite Bloodstone from other top forces!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But unfortunately, those forces will not trade Infinite Bloodstone at all, or even mine Infinite Bloodstone.

After all, in the Immeasurable Realm Ruins, the Immeasurable Blood Stone has evolved over a long period of time, and there is a certain chance that it will evolve into the Immeasurable Blood Gold Stone.

For a force like Jiuyang Hai, obtaining a little more Infinite Blood Gold Stone is also more valuable than mining countless Infinite Blood Stones.

As a result, they do not mine Infinite Bloodstone.

"Let's try how many immeasurable bloodstones can be fused into one immeasurable bloodstone first!"

Ye Tian took out the immeasurable blood stones and fused them together one by one.

Ten pieces!

Twenty!

Thirty!

When Ye Tian fused a hundred immeasurable bloodstones, an immeasurable bloodstone was born.

"A hundred immeasurable bloodstones can be fused into an immeasurable bloodstone, which is very good, there are too many immeasurable bloodstones in my hand, this has to be fused into a massive immeasurable bloodstone!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

In this way, when he broke through to the fourth stage of the high-level immeasurable life form, he would not be short of resources, and those top forces would not be able to limit his resources.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Infinite Ruin Monster copied his body and prepared to explore the Infinite Boundary Ruins and learn about the situation of the Infinite Boundary Ruins.

Maybe you can find a great opportunity in the Infinite Boundary Ruins, even if there are no other great opportunities, but if you find the place where the Infinite Boundary Beast fell, you can also get a large amount of Infinite Blood Stone and Infinite Blood Gold Stone!

Still, there must be a rarity in that place.

It is estimated that it is easier to encounter a living Immeasurable Beast than a fallen Immeasurable Beast.

I saw Ye Tian wandering around the Infinite Realm Ruins, and almost all he saw were Void Void and other Infinite Ruins Monsters.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian sensed the aura of a terrifying immeasurable ruin monster, and the other party's aura crossed the long territory and acted on Ye Tian's body, seemingly driving Ye Tian away.

If Ye Tian advances, I'm afraid he will be attacked.

"I'm afraid the strength of this immeasurable ruin monster is at the top in the fourth stage, I'm not an opponent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As for the copy body of this immeasurable ruin monster, it is not worth mentioning, and it will be killed in an instant.

So, Ye Tian shifted his direction and went to explore other places.

this day.

Thundered!!!!

In the distance, there are battle fluctuations.

This aroused Ye Tian's curiosity, so he went over to take a look.

Soon, he discovered the existence of the Infinite Realm Beast.
